IotDeviceService/Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade the base builder image from OpenJDK 17 to Amazon Corretto 21 with Maven to support Java 21 compilation.
IotDeviceService/Dockerfile.why_exists: The application code is migrated to Java 21; using a JDK 17 builder image would fail to compile Java 21 source code or dependencies.

IotDeviceService/Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade the final runtime image from OpenJDK 17 to Amazon Corretto 21 to run the Java 21 application.
IotDeviceService/Dockerfile.why_exists: The compiled JAR requires a Java 21 runtime; running it on a JDK 17 image would result in a 'Unsupported class version' error at startup.

IotDeviceService/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch from the Maven wrapper script to the system-installed Maven command in the builder stage.
Add an environment variable to set the active Spring profile for the container.
Update the startup command to pass the Spring profile via a JVM system property using the new environment variable.

IotDeviceService/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 3.2.2 to 3.4.3 to align with Java 21 ecosystem and receive latest framework features.
Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to enable compilation and execution on JDK 21.
IotDeviceService/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation failure if source code uses Java 21 features or if the build tool enforces the target version property.

IotDeviceService/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Cloud version property to manage dependency versions for Spring Cloud components.
Add Spring Cloud Netflix Eureka Client dependency to enable service discovery capabilities.
Add Spring Boot Starter Validation dependency to enable Bean Validation (JSR 380) support.
Add Spring Boot Starter Data JPA dependency to enable JPA data access capabilities.
Add PostgreSQL JDBC driver dependency to enable connectivity to PostgreSQL databases.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI UI dependency to generate Swagger/OpenAPI documentation for the REST API.
Add Jackson Databind dependency explicitly to ensure JSON serialization/deserialization support.
Add Jackson Module Parameter Names dependency to support parameter name discovery for JSON serialization.
Add Jackson Datatype JSR310 dependency to support Java 8 Date/Time API serialization.
Add Jackson Datatype JDK8 dependency to support Java 8 specific types like Optional.
Add Spring Kafka dependency to enable integration with Apache Kafka message broker.
Add Spring Cloud Dependencies BOM to manage versions of all Spring Cloud dependencies consistently.

IotDeviceService/src/main/java/com/anton.general_idea: Add the 'final' modifier to the main method's args parameter for immutability.
IotDeviceService/src/main/java/com/anton.after: public static void main(final String[] args)

UserService/Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade the base builder image from OpenJDK 17 slim to Amazon Corretto 21 with Maven 3.9.6 to support Java 21 compilation.
UserService/Dockerfile.why_exists: The application code is migrated to Java 21; using a JDK 17 image would result in compilation errors for Java 21 language features or dependencies.

UserService/Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade the final runtime image from OpenJDK 17 slim to Amazon Corretto 21 to support running the Java 21 application.
UserService/Dockerfile.why_exists: The compiled JAR requires a Java 21 runtime; running it on JDK 17 would cause a NoSuchMethodError or UnsupportedClassVersionError at startup.

UserService/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch from using the Maven wrapper (./mvnw) to the system-installed Maven (mvn) provided by the new base image.
UserService/Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image (maven:3.9.6-amazoncorretto-21) includes Maven in the PATH, making the wrapper unnecessary and potentially missing if not copied correctly.

UserService/Dockerfile.general_idea: Add environment variable and JVM argument to activate the 'prod' Spring profile by default in the container.

UserService/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.4.3 to align with the Java 21 migration target.
Update the Java source and target version property from 17 to 21.
UserService/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation failure if the project is built with a JDK 21 compiler but configured for Java 17 features, or runtime incompatibility if specific Java 21 features are used.

UserService/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Cloud version property to manage cloud dependencies.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI dependency for API documentation generation.
Add Spring Cloud Netflix Eureka Client dependency for service discovery.
Add Spring Boot Starter Validation dependency for bean validation.
Add Spring Boot Starter Data JPA dependency for database access.
Add PostgreSQL driver dependency for database connectivity.
Add Spring Boot Starter Security dependency for authentication and authorization.
Add JJWT API dependency for JWT token handling.
Add JJWT Implementation dependency for JWT token handling.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency for JWT token serialization.
Add Spring Security Test dependency for testing security configurations.
Add Spring Cloud Dependencies BOM to manage cloud dependency versions.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Remove deprecated 'version' key from docker-compose file to comply with modern Compose specification.
Add MQTT broker service (eclipse-mosquitto) to support IoT device communication.
Add Zookeeper service as a dependency for Kafka.
Add Kafka service for event streaming.
Add PostgreSQL database service for persistent storage.
Add Eureka Server service for service discovery.
Add API Gateway service to route external requests.
Add gRPC Server service for high-performance internal communication.
Add pgAdmin service for database administration.
Add MQTT Client service to interact with the MQTT broker.
Add Real Time Data Service for processing streaming data.
Define shared network and volumes for container communication and data persistence.
docker-compose.yml.after:
networks:
  my-network:
    driver: bridge
volumes:
  local_pgdata:

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to a release compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.2.x does not officially support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading to 3.4.x is required to ensure compatibility and access to Java 21 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Change the target Java version property from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with the target runtime if the source/target version does not match the intended JDK 21 environment.
